page_content:
Prerequisite: PHYS271, ENME350, and PHYS270.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 209

ENME361 Vibration, Controls and Optimization | (3 Credits) Fundamentals of vibration, controls and optimization. Analysis

and design in time, Laplace and frequency domains. Mathematical description of system response, system stability, control and optimization. Optimal design of mechanical systems.
